programme.title: Fashion & Sports
programme.desc: Athleisure is conquering the world! Everyone looks like having just finished a work-out in the gym, while grabbing a cappuccino. If this lifestyle is yours, be first to discover the must-haves!

programme.title: Fashion & Sports
programme.desc: Athleisure is conquering the world! Everyone looks like having just finished a work-out in the gym, while grabbing a cappuccino. If this lifestyle is yours, be first to discover the must-haves!

programme.title: Beauty
programme.desc: Get inspired with the latest trends in hairstyles, enjoy the tips and tricks of the top makeup artists and get the best use of the exclusive guide in the world of skincare products!

programme.title: Beauty
programme.desc: Get inspired with the latest trends in hairstyles, enjoy the tips and tricks of the top makeup artists and get the best use of the exclusive guide in the world of skincare products!

programme.title: Fashion From Uk
programme.desc: Fashion and the UK go hand-in-hand. Keep updated about the news of the British fashion famed for its historic creativity inspired by eccentricity, diversity and age-old traditions.

programme.title: Fashion From Uk
programme.desc: Fashion and the UK go hand-in-hand. Keep updated about the news of the British fashion famed for its historic creativity inspired by eccentricity, diversity and age-old traditions.

programme.title: Bella Hadid
programme.desc: Check in for Bella Hadid’s story at the height of her fame. Thanks to her talents and sphinx-like beauty she made her way into the high fashion stratosphere being part of the supermodel's family

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women’s Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei’s father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Disciples of the 36th Chamber
programme.desc: In the finale of this trilogy, Gordon Liu reprises his famous role, Monk San Te, as he tries to protect Fang Shih Yu, an arrogant youth who gets into trouble with the Qing officials, and nearly lands Shaolin Temple into trouble too.

programme.title: Fox Hunt
programme.desc: Adapted from true events, Fraudster Dai swindled countless victims across China before vanishing without a trace. Seven years later, he resurfaces in Paris. Led by Detective Ye Jun, the Chinese Fox Hunt Team launches a high-stakes cross-border mission to recover the stolen assets and uncovers shocking secrets during the pursuit.

programme.title: The Hidden Power Of Dragon Sabre
programme.desc: Defeated villain Sung Ching Shu returns and starts a reign of terror, trapping a beautiful Mongolian Princess and mastering the "yin and yang combination" to become almost invincible. Only two swords held by two great swordsmen can stand in his way!

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Ready O/R Rot
programme.desc: Guy and Heidi are finally getting married but pressure from Guy’s mother creates much friction between them. Meanwhile, Grey Bear suspects his wife of cheating on him and Ken faces the biggest crisis of his life when Jessica accidentally gets pregnant. Can they eventually solve their relationship problems?

programme.title: Challenge of the Masters
programme.desc: Young Wong Fei Hung must prove himself worthy to be taught by Master Lu, who was also his father’s martial arts teacher. Although he is defeated in a competition, Wong Fei Hung’s passion in Kung Fu finally moves Lu and allows him to become Lu’s disciple.

programme.title: The Sparring Partner
programme.desc: Adapted from a sensational 2013 parricide in Hong Kong, a young man partners with his friend to murder and dismember his parents. Pleading not guilty, the defendants play the devil and idiot game, while the defense attorneys turn on each other. Meanwhile, heated debates emerge inside the jury room, where nine jurors grapple with the truth.

programme.title: The Savage Five
programme.desc: A group of bandits flees with a stolen safe to a village where they oppress the villagers and force the blacksmith Wei to unlock the safe. Wei refuses and flees to report to officials, while heroes of the town emerge to fight the bandits.

programme.title: Man Of Iron
programme.desc: A fearless fighter, Chou Lian Huan has risen to power in Shanghai with his exceptional combat skills. He risks his life for hostess Shen Ju Fang and embarks on a series of fierce battles against the son of a notorious triad leader and his gang, ultimately becoming a scapegoat in the gang's deadly turf war.

programme.title: The Way We Keep Dancing
programme.desc: This sequel of “The Way We Dance” features the plight of Hong Kong’s grassroots performing artists as they fight against the government’s plan to gentrify an industrial district where they settled in.

programme.title: I Still Remember
programme.desc: Chi is a property agent who leads an aimless and unfulfilling life until he reunites with his P.E. teacher, Wong, from primary school. Despite his illness, Wong insists on keeping his promise of completing a 10K marathon to his late wife. Inspired by Wong, Chi brings himself to his feet and finds the courage to cheer himself on!

programme.title: Golden Swallow
programme.desc: A heroine finds herself in a love triangle with a swordsman and a warrior. They team up to conquer the evil forces of the martial arts world but she is unable to choose between both men even as they face a deadly duel.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Two feuding princes fight for the throne in the Qing Dynasty, causing many injuries and deaths to the commoners. Can the lady assassin who is drawn into this royal feud execute her assassination mission in time to help one of the princes secure the throne?

programme.title: Bituing Walang Ningning (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: A tale about an avid fan that attained her dream of someday becoming a bigger star than her idol.

programme.title: Kahit Sa Bala Kakapit Ako
programme.desc: Friendship comes to a test in this tale about the mild-mannered Efren and Nestor, the member of an underground rebel group. Efren became unwittingly involved with Nestor's activities when he was put under suspicion.

programme.title: Bad Boy (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: This was the landmark film that launched Robin Padilla to stardom as one of the biggest action stars in the Philippine cinema. Robin played a young man branded as "bad boy" for life because as a kid he killed his father in defense of his mother.

programme.title: Matinik Na Bading, Mga Syokeng Buking
programme.desc: Apolinario and his uncle Boyong came from a family of barbers. They earned very little and in order to make more, they pretended to be gay.

programme.title: Ex-Army
programme.desc: Lt. Emil Medrano is a bemedalled military officer assigned to infiltrate the communist movement. On his way to the movement's stronghold, he becomes involved in an encounter between soldiers and the rebels.

programme.title: James Bone Agent 001
programme.desc: Ninong, the syndicate's big boss, is dead. There are three usurpers to the vacant throne--Crooked Fingers, Boy Macho and Sabrina. To settle the rivalry, they agree on the ultimate contest.

programme.title: Papunta Ka Pa Lang, Pabalik Na Ako
programme.desc: Gaston, a veteran police officer does not want Jojo, a rookie police asset, for his daughter. Jojo proves himself and he finds a sidekick in Jojo.

programme.title: The Sarah Balabagan Story
programme.desc: All her life, she has known how it is to be poor. So at a tender age, she gives up her youth and flies off to a far country to earn the money that she hopes will lift her family from privation.

programme.title: Bayad Puri
programme.desc: Cases of sexual harassment in the present-day Philippine society were what made up BAYAD PURI, another powerful film by Joel Lamangan.

programme.title: Ober Da Bakod The Movie
programme.desc: The movie version of the popular TV sitcom, Ober De Bakod. This is a story of two families, always in competition -- they are actually neighbors. In this movie, the parents continue to fight and outdo each other, while the children continue their love affairs with each other. However, this time, they all go on holiday -- separately of course. It does not start well, as they all ended up in an island where they meet the natives and have problems with the bad guys.

programme.title: Kaputol Ng Isang Awit
programme.desc: An unfinished song became the key, which brought together a family forced apart by the obsessive love of a young woman for a famous singer.

programme.title: Minsan Pa Nating Hagkan Ang Nakaraan (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Helen looks like a woman who has everything anybody could want-a beautiful house, a loving husband, and a baby on the way.

programme.title: Kailangan Ko'y Ikaw
programme.desc: Francine Natra (Regine Velasquez) and Gimo Talumpati (Robin Padilla) crossed paths when Gimo won the "Date With A Star" contest thus taking the popular Francine on a special date. But their fairytale love story struggled when the relationship went public.

programme.desc: Michael wows mall shoppers with snakes that soothe and spiders that stitch, and at an art supply store, a woman finds out that she's a natural-born wood whittler. Plus, an abandoned house won't let go of its precious things.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 11
programme.desc: At a yard sale, Michael helps a man realize his amazing mind powers and shocks a college student by discovering she's the heir to the entire lot. Later, an art gallery's tribal mask goes missing and has the security guard fearing war!

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 2
programme.desc: Gentlemen, start your engines! We've got a motorcade of 20 of the dumbest drivers to ever turn an ignition. There's a backwards biker, a superhero stopped for speeding and an extreme case of Russian road rage. Along for the ride is our celebrity castincluding Judy Gold, Danny Bonaduce, Kevin McCaffrey and Billy Kimball.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 3
programme.desc: Competition boils over when bitter rivals Brandon and Jesse throw down over a storage unit containing an amazing movie monster and a potential hundred thousand dollar payout. Security steps in, but can they separate the boys before the blood hits thefloor?

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 4
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori look to cash in on their first big trip to New Orleans, but the locals are hungering for a fight. Then, the Taylor Brothers wage war to win a locker loaded with hunting and sporting equipment. What no one knows is that hidden beneaththe fishing poles, bear traps and camping gear is the score of a lifetime. And later, fireworks explode when a locker full of liquor and rare Mardi Gras masks spark a do or die bidding war.

programme.title: Friends S6 4
programme.desc: Injured Joey must get an acting part in order to qualify for health insurance. Rachel finally learns the truth about her marriage to Ross.

programme.title: Friends S6 5
programme.desc: Joey pretends to be the owner of a Porsche whose owner left his keys at Central Perk. Rachel and Ross get divorced. Chandler and Monica babysit Phoebe's triplets.

programme.title: Smallville S2 12
programme.desc: After discovering that Lionel has secretly installed video cameras in the mansion, Lex hires thugs to put surveillance devices in Lionel's Metropolis office.

programme.title: Gran Torino
programme.desc: Retired auto worker, Korean War veteran and widower Walt Kowalski (Clint Eastwood) sets out to reform his neighbor, a young Hmong teenager, who tried to steal Kowalski's prized possession: a 1972 Ford Gran Torino he keeps in mint condition.

programme.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
programme.desc: Stone Age Earth: In the presence of a mysterious black obelisk, pre-humans discover the use of tools--and weapons--violently taking first steps toward intelligence. 1999: On Earth's moon astronauts uncover another mysterious black obelisk. 2001: Between Earth and Jupiter, the spacecraft's intelligent computer makes a mistake that kills most of the human crew--then continues to kill to hide its error. Beyond Time: The sole survivor of the journey to Jupiter ascends to the next level of humanity.

programme.title: Smallville S2 12
programme.desc: After discovering that Lionel has secretly installed video cameras in the mansion, Lex hires thugs to put surveillance devices in Lionel's Metropolis office.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 10
programme.desc: Michael wows mall shoppers with snakes that soothe and spiders that stitch, and at an art supply store, a woman finds out that she's a natural-born wood whittler. Plus, an abandoned house won't let go of its precious things.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 2
programme.desc: Gentlemen, start your engines! We've got a motorcade of 20 of the dumbest drivers to ever turn an ignition. There's a backwards biker, a superhero stopped for speeding and an extreme case of Russian road rage. Along for the ride is our celebrity castincluding Judy Gold, Danny Bonaduce, Kevin McCaffrey and Billy Kimball.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 11
programme.desc: At a yard sale, Michael helps a man realize his amazing mind powers and shocks a college student by discovering she's the heir to the entire lot. Later, an art gallery's tribal mask goes missing and has the security guard fearing war!

programme.title: The West Wing S1 12
programme.desc: The President is ill before the State of the Union Address.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 6
programme.desc: Exploding balls, a barrage of buckshot and more plague those competing for a shot at the prize.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 8
programme.desc: Hot items from New Orleans spice up the bidding, but will the cans bring in the green? Or will a voodoo curse make its mark? Plus, a refrigerated unit sends chills down bidders' spines when they discover its intended recipient is incarcerated.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 5
programme.desc: Back on the bayou, the buyers are ready to crack open the abandoned lockers and throw down some serious cash. Local legend FJ sees big dollar signs in old voodoo artifacts. Brandon and Lori unearth a rare find with a potentially priceless payout. Andall bets are off when a bidding war over endangered species taxidermy ends in a heated stand-off with the local authorities.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 6
programme.desc: The buyers press their luck in Sin City where Brandon and Lori get outfoxed by a group of locals with a questionable strategy. Then, Jesse gambles on a locker filled with junk. Everyone thinks he's crazy, but he knows something they don't. And later,vintage slot machines and poker tables send bidding through the roof. The closing price is stratospheric, but what's hidden from sight will be the ultimate payday for one lucky Storage Hunter.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 7
programme.desc: A deceptive ninja faces off with royalty for one of two spots left in the Tournament of Champions.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 3
programme.desc: Pull back the curtain on 20 of the dumbest performers ever to take the stage - from an angry Elmo to a lion trainer who almost becomes dinner and a woman who crushes watermelons. They all get harsh reviews from celebrities like Danny Bonaduce and Leif Garrett, plus hot comics like Mike Trainor.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 12
programme.desc: While doing scientific research, Michael makes things heavy with some otherworldly air. Then, at a bakery, the new rolls are so light, they defy gravity. And as a golf instructor, Michael gets caught by the ultimate sand trap!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 13
programme.desc: At a local copy shop, Michael introduces a print-by-hand technique, and at a bait and tackle shop, he unveils the latest fish fashion trends. Finally, at an office, Michael pulls a switcheroo, and the new temp has no idea who's the boss.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.desc: BMX golden girl Saya Sakakibara dreamed of sharing Olympic glory with her brother Kai. When a racing accident almost took his life, Saya had to overcome crippling fear and ride for both of them.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - Episode 9
programme.desc: Julia Zemiro gets a unique perspective on Melbourne, via its famous waterway - the Yarra River.

programme.title: Bee Cause - Liquid Gold
programme.desc: Rottnest Island is home to the world's oldest queen bee breeding program. And bio-active honey from Western Australia's unique Jarrah and other forests has been discovered by the world, sparking a liquid gold rush.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals - Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode delves into surprising behaviours of some of Australia's most unlikely romantics. With some incredible connections that enhance their species' survival, these animals go above and beyond in the name of 'love'.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Summer: Arid Botanic Garden & Home Orchard
programme.desc: Sophie visits a home orchard with unfamiliar fruits, Hannah meets an expert in pretty perennials, Jerry grows seeds for spice and sprouts, Millie taste tests tomatoes, and we explore a stunning botanic garden in the desert.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 3
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 6
programme.desc: The 2nd year of Trump's 2nd term brings new challenges and new storylines with Venezuela, Iran, Greenland, Mexico, Russia/Ukraine, China, the Middle East, security, the economy, tariffs, migration, ICE and midterm elections.

programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow.

programme.title: The Business - Episode 22
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 38
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World - Episode 38
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - Episode 9
programme.desc: Julia Zemiro gets a unique perspective on Melbourne, via its famous waterway - the Yarra River.

programme.title: Australian Story - Ride Of Her Life - Saya Sakakibara
programme.desc: BMX golden girl Saya Sakakibara dreamed of sharing Olympic glory with her brother Kai. When a racing accident almost took his life, Saya had to overcome crippling fear and ride for both of them.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Summer: Arid Botanic Garden & Home Orchard
programme.desc: Sophie visits a home orchard with unfamiliar fruits, Hannah meets an expert in pretty perennials, Jerry grows seeds for spice and sprouts, Millie taste tests tomatoes, and we explore a stunning botanic garden in the desert.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw - Simply Delicious
programme.desc: It's Easy Entertaining, and chef Federica Andrisani and Food Trail: South Africa host Warren Mendes are here to help Adam put on a simply delicious spread.

programme.title: The World - Episode 38
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 50
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. Bridget Brennan and James Glenday present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Emma Rebellato, Catherine Murphy and Nate Byrne.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 50
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. Bridget Brennan and James Glenday present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Emma Rebellato, Catherine Murphy and Nate Byrne.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 50
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 50
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 3
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: ABC National Forum - Episode 1
programme.desc: The first ABC National Forum will focus on the lives and experiences of Jewish Australians, including issues arising from the Bondi terrorist attack. David Speers facilitates a wide-ranging conversation among the audience.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: A spoiled heiress falls in love with the cynical newspaperman she enlists to help her escape her domineering father.

programme.title: Armour Of God
programme.desc: Asian Hawk (Jackie Chan) and his bumbling sidekick are sent on a quest through Europe to find a mysterious treasure held by a shadowy organization of monks.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Have the time of your life with Meryl Streep and an all-star cast in this undeniably fun celebration of mothers and daughters, old friends and newly found family!

programme.desc: A football player and his friends travel to the planet Mongo and find themselves fighting the tyranny of Ming the Merciless to save Earth.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female cop moves into a small town, and gets drawn to a case that involves a girl who is possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Trapped in an abandoned house, a young man desperately searches for clues about his trapped situation. The unsettling truth actually lies in a sequence of viral videos and they gradually corrupt his mind…

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female cop moves into a small town, and gets drawn to a case that involves a girl who is possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Trapped in an abandoned house, a young man desperately searches for clues about his trapped situation. The unsettling truth actually lies in a sequence of viral videos and they gradually corrupt his mind…

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2

Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: Hong Kong's King Of Thieves
programme.desc: An infamous Hong Kong gangster well-known for robbing jewellery stores with AK-47 assault rifles, he also has a knack for escaping police custody.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Arthur Shawcross tells a lot of stories about his life before he began to kill. He might have been known for killing women along Rochester's Genesee River, but his first murder was years earlier.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: Detectives gather crucial information about a double-homicide from neighbourhood surveillance footage, but they're not able to identify and track the killer until some key digital data is uncovered.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S2)
programme.desc: When a young college student disappears on her evening run, investigators scour her small town searching for her. And when her accused attacker, Cristhian Bahena Rivera takes the stand.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder (S1)
programme.desc: After being pursued by handsome Kevin Lewis, Amanda can't wait to marry her new man. But on their honeymoon, Amanda discovers a different side to Kevin — he likes things done a certain way.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in DeRidder, Louisiana, receives a distressing phone call from the owner of Dee's Motel. The man tells them that he's found a woman dead in room 6.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3)
programme.desc: Exotic animal dealer William 'Wild Bill' Zelenski is accused of murdering his girlfriend's 18-year-old son, Ryelee Manente-Powell, after he stole $27,000 worth of venomous and exotic reptiles.

programme.title: Malaysian Drug Mules
programme.desc: Follow the Royal Malaysian Police as they go in pursuit of sinister Nigerian gangs who deceive or coerce hundreds of Malaysian women into smuggling drugs.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After an 80-year-old woman vanishes, local police and the FBI team up in the pursuit of a suspected serial killer.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: At the scene of a chilling triple murder in Northern Maine, detectives recover DNA evidence that suggests an out-of-town visitor may be behind the brutal crime.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Terri blames hoarding on her busy schedule, but past trauma reveals the truth. After a fire raised safety concerns, she must clean up with the Hoarders team.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover agents Lyle Kirian and Brian Townsend embed themselves in two different but equally dangerous worlds in order to investigate suspected local gang members and the Mexican cartel.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: When an accomplished young musician and local stage actress is found lifeless in her own bed, no one in Hartford, Wisconsin, can figure out what happened.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: 10-year-old Karen Pedley was hailed a hero when she saved her family from a fire. That event triggered a lifelong obsession, one which would lead to her setting alight the nursing home where she worked.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Growing up gay in the hyper-masculine Bayou was tough on Ronald Dominique. An inability to connect and a prison sexual assault would cement his decision to ultimately kill his first victim.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A young woman is brutally attacked on the train by an assailant; a coach witnesses a student with a gun roam the hall; a store clerk faces a suspect trying to rob him with an unusual weapon.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A simple snack at a local restaurant turns violent when a grandmother is ripped off, but does not give up. A woman takes on the man who slammed into her van and then tries to run.

programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away - much to Squidward’s delight. // When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost... in the lost & found!

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Chloe, Jinx, and Booch are designing a new school mascot, but Max and Phoebe's fighting ruins the project. After Chloe expresses her anger toward her siblings, they realize their twin-fighting impacts Chloe in new ways now that they're guardians.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Danger Force sees an opportunity to make money fast by hosting Swellview's hottest music festival, but they catch a case of the Kramps when Krampus threatens to ruin their plans.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When a dangerous piñata ends up at a kid’s birthday party, Kid Danger and Captain Man must go undercover and step in before it’s too late.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Who kidnapped Rod? Where is the mutagen? Why is Rod's family so weird? Everything has led to a confrontation of Rod's dad... but even with Rod's help, can Mikey and his brothers defeat the mutant known as MUCKMAN?

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To avoid his responsibilities, Lincoln uses Lisa's hologram device to make it appear like he's doing all of his tasks. // With Mom busy at work, the Loud siblings are tasked with taking care of Dad when he overreacts to getting a cold.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lincoln’s mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
